narrative:
Independence Local Sd (Cuy) school district has 5,916 registered voters, with 56.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 23.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 19.8%, a modest Republican lean of 4.1 percentage points. Registration is trending bluer in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean -1.9% D−R vs -6.7% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
